next_action: GP3 is recorded and closed. Await explicit owner authorization before GP4; do not start GP4 or runtime.

research_gate: GP0, GP1 and GP2 are complete and C4V is promoted. GP3 is game-first and authored-only: readiness and adversarial gates precede source; GP4, runtime, generation, weights and C3B remain blocked.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized bounded GP3 authored encounter grammar only. Exactly five fixed situations; no procedural generation, weights, random selection, runtime, GP4, C3B, Greenfield, persistence expansion, combat resolver, economy mapping, automatic GP2 progression or Kernel mutation.
context_health: GP3 is promoted, recorded and closed after independently accepted readiness and implementation, 18 focused hostile tests, retained regressions, workspace integration and registered complete gate run-50a8c78043eb46c483f1f655d3793f9b. GP4 and runtime remain owner-gated and inactive.

macro_findings: GP3 is the game-first authored encounter-grammar item after verified GP0-GP2 and C4V.
Exactly five fixed situations cover environment, creature, society, anomaly and construction domains.
GP3 may reference exact GP0 consequences but performs no GP2 mapping or automatic progression.
GP4, runtime, procedural generation, selection weights and C3B remain excluded.
micro_findings: Each situation binds domain facets plus evidence and risk references to one fixed GP0 session.
Each situation admits at least two threat-free resolutions plus retreat; S3 force is partial only.
Optional nonterminal threat contribution is allowed only in S2, S4 and S5.
Strict codecs, hard bounds, an internal fixed registry and a hostile negative matrix precede implementation acceptance.

visual_quality_gate.rationale: C4V readiness and persistence proof are typed and engine-neutral with no admitted visual asset.

tiers_completed.result: The owner-authorized boundary fixes five authored situations, exact domain facets, resolution cardinality, threat limits and GP0-only consequence references.

simulation_ladder.unresolved_risk: A grammar could fabricate generation authority, map directly to GP2, make force universally sufficient or promote optional threat into a terminal requirement.
simulation_ladder.expected_information_gain: Determine whether five materially distinct authored encounters can be strict, readable and consequence-bound without generation or runtime authority.
simulation_ladder.estimated_cost: One bounded readiness/design pair, test-first implementation, hostile matrix, independent review and one registered complete gate.
simulation_ladder.regression_guard: No GP4, runtime, procedural generation, weights, random selection, C3B, Greenfield or automatic GP2 mapping.
simulation_ladder.stop_condition: Stop after the GP3 recorded result; do not start GP4 or runtime.
simulation_ladder.final_integration_gate: Focused GP3, retained GP0/GP1/GP2, independent review, workspace and one registered complete Forge gate.

exit_criteria.label: Exactly five strict authored situations bind domain facets, evidence, risk and one GP0 session.
Every situation has at least two threat-free resolutions plus retreat; S3 force is partial and threat is optional nonterminal only in S2, S4 and S5.
Resolution consequences reference exact GP0 outcome records and never map to GP2 progression.
Strict codecs, bounds and internal registry add no generation, weights, runtime, GP4, C3B or Kernel authority.

unresolved_risks: domain facets could become procedural-generation inputs
force could be mislabeled as a complete S3 resolution
optional threat could become terminal or mandatory
consequence references could leak automatic GP2 mapping
evidence_requirements: freeze five fixed situation identities and per-domain facet schemas
prove evidence and risk references resolve inside each exact GP0 session
prove at least two threat-free resolutions plus retreat per situation
prove S3 force partial and optional nonterminal threat only S2 S4 S5
prove strict codec bounds internal registry and no GP2 GP4 runtime generation weights or C3B authority
verification_plan: retain independently accepted readiness design and fixed registry before source
implement the smallest authored-only grammar in the gameplay foundation or a context-justified sibling
run focused retained independent workspace and one registered complete gate
resume_after: GP3 is closed. Resume only after explicit owner authorization for GP4 or another queued master-program item; do not infer runtime authority.
evidence: C4V closed cleanly in commit 34f2213 and registered run-fa6334a300e04d409dd5cddb4f22542e.
Owner authorized the queued game-first GP3 route with exactly five fixed authored situations.
Every situation requires domain facets, evidence/risk references, two threat-free resolutions and retreat.
S3 force is partial; optional nonterminal threat contribution is limited to S2, S4 and S5.
Consequences reference exact GP0 outcomes; GP2 mapping, generation, weights, runtime, GP4 and C3B remain excluded.
Independent pre-source review accepted the typed multi-facet registry, exact digest framing, prerequisites, causal explanations, complete consequence references and hostile bounds.
Independent candidate review accepted exact helper authority, direct-situation bounds, 18 hostile tests, retained regressions, workspace check, module context and record roles.
Registered complete Forge gate run-50a8c78043eb46c483f1f655d3793f9b passed in 490027 ms.
transition: GP2 promoted -> C4V promoted after registered closure -> owner-authorized GP3 activated -> independently accepted readiness -> red-first implementation -> independently accepted candidate -> registered verification passed -> GP3 promoted and recorded
